title: 2000x leverage with Opt Fun on Hyperliquid
summary_title: OptFun: Building 1000X leverage options on Hyperliquid
summary_description: Ryan from OptFun explains how they created fair, on-chain options trading with 1000X leverage for one-minute Bitcoin bets.

key_moments.label: Intro: hosts meet with OptFun's Ryan to discuss the platform
Ryan introduces OptFun: 1000X leverage options on Hyperliquid for one minute
Why OptFun chose Hyperliquid: ecosystem merit, no VC dumping, devoted traders
Technical deep dive: on-chain order book, settlement every minute, UX simplicity
Trading tips: enter early in cycle, watch momentum, start with 200X leverage
Future roadmap: HYPE token support, HIP3 oracle integration, mobile app development
Monetization and sustainability: 5% maker-taker fees, points system, potential airdrops
Wrap-up: community feedback encouraged, points system teased, call to action
